data.title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
data.description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still can't get access.

data.title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
data.description: Customer attemped to pay using Visa ending 1324 but the payment keeps failing despite sufficient balance.

data.title: Unable to Download Invoice
data.description: Customer cannot downlaod their January invoice fromt he billing section. The download button is enable but it is not doing anything.

data.title: Website Loading Slowly
data.description: Customer experiences very slow loading times when browsing product pages.

data.title: Payment Failure
data.description: Customer reports that their credit card payment keeps failing during checkout despite having sufficient balance.

data.title: Delayed Order Delivery
data.description: Customer has not received their order even after the estimated delivery date has passed.

data.title: Account Suspension Issue
data.description: Customer's account was suspended without notification and they are requesting clarification.

data.title: Refund Not Processed
data.description: Customer returned a product two weeks ago but has not yet received their refund.

data.title: App Crashing on Launch
data.description: Customer reports that the mobile app crashes immediately after opening it on Android device.

data.title: Incorrect Billing Amount
data.description: Customer was charged twice for the same subscription renewal.

data.title: Unable to Update Profile
data.description: Customer cannot update their email address in account settings due to a validation error.

data.title: Missing Order Items
data.description: Customer received their package but some items were missing from the box.

data.title: Password Reset Email Not Received
data.description: Customer requested a password reset but did not receive any email in inbox or spam folder.
